description: AI Gateway unified analysis endpoint. Routes medical reports and clinical data to multiple specialized models for comprehensive risk assessment.

report_type.description: Type of medical report or auto-detect

raw_text.description: Raw OCR text from medical report

example_with_ocr_text.raw_text: Patient: 55M. BP: 150/90. Glucose: 180. Total Cholesterol: 280. Creatinine: 1.5. BMI: 32. History of hypertension for 10 years. Smoker.

response_includes.model_outputs: individual model predictions (diabetes, heart, kidney, stroke, thyroid, autism)
response_includes.rag_context: relevant medical knowledge retrieved from knowledge base
response_includes.kg_insights: related symptoms, treatments, complications from knowledge graph
response_includes.risk_assessment: integrated risk analysis across all models

extraction_pipeline.description: AI Gateway automatically detects report type and routes to appropriate parsers
extraction_pipeline.step_1_ocr: Convert medical report image/PDF to text using OCR service
extraction_pipeline.step_2_routing: Detect disease type (diabetes, heart, kidney, liver, stroke, thyroid, autism) using routing engine
extraction_pipeline.step_3_parse: Route raw text to appropriate parser (diabetes_parser, heart_parser, etc.)
extraction_pipeline.step_4_extract: Extract structured fields with validation and fallback defaults
extraction_pipeline.step_5_model: Submit extracted data to disease-specific ML model
extraction_pipeline.step_6_enrich: Enhance with RAG medical knowledge and knowledge graph insights
